entity.summary: Linea decentralized exchange protocol with current liquidity and active recent swap volume, modeled as one entity across versioned discovery rows.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies EchoDEX as a Linea DEX and reports current TVL plus non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume. HEI consolidates V2 and V3 source rows into one EchoDEX entity. A stable first-party website URL was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: EchoDEX project social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used for identity corroboration.

evidence.title: EchoDEX metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies EchoDEX as a Linea DEX and reports current TVL plus non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour swap volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: EchoDEX DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus corroborates EchoDEX identity; versioned source rows are consolidated into one HEI entity.
